policy.summary: Candidate Ava brain/data upgrades are staged here before any package install, clone, provider write, or production dependency is enabled.
rules: Do not mark an integration Ready until a local or sandbox round trip succeeds.
Do not expose provider keys in frontend code.
Do not let external CRM/data tools replace PBK's canonical lead, deal, script, or activity state.
Do not use scraping tools against sites, logins, or endpoints where automation is not allowed.
Store source URLs and confidence with any property facts Ava uses.

propertyData.purpose: Feed Ava/Rex structured listings, comps, public record context, and on-demand property research.

items.label: HomeHarvest
items.role: Structured Realtor.com-style lead and comps feed
readyWhen: Package is installed in the intended Python environment
A dry-run property query returns JSON
Results dedupe into Supabase or local lead import without provider writes

items.label: Scrapling MCP
items.role: On-demand browser/data extraction fallback for Rex and property research
readyWhen: MCP server starts locally
One allowed public property page returns structured output
Browser research records source URLs and obeys source rules

pipelineMemory.purpose: Give Ava long-term pipeline context without replacing PBK's canonical CRM/activity model.

items.label: InsulaCRM
readyWhen: Deployed on a PBK-controlled subdomain
Bidirectional sync is tested with a non-production lead
DNC/TCPA status is checked before Ava calls

items.label: RealtorsPal AI
items.role: Optional research candidate only until primary documentation and API surface are verified
readyWhen: Primary source documentation is verified
API authentication and data export terms are reviewed
A sandbox sync is tested without mutating PBK lead state

voiceFallback.purpose: Provide local/offline voice resilience if cloud TTS is unavailable.

items.label: MOSS-TTS
readyWhen: Model assets are installed on the intended machine
Local endpoint returns playable audio
Bridge fallback does not interrupt active Telnyx calls

items.label: ZeroVOX
readyWhen: Local wrapper returns playable audio
Latency is acceptable for fallback use
Generated voice is clearly approved for business calls

desktopCopilot.purpose: Optional local sidecar for Jordan during high-stakes calls; not a production dependency.

items.label: ClickUi
items.role: Local AI desktop assistant and research sidecar
readyWhen: Runs locally without blocking PBK runtime
Can call PBK analyzer or bridge in read-only mode
Any scraped facts are copied into PBK with source URLs
